storyboard.content: I have a small red itchy rash on my forearm that I noticed about 2 weeks ago.
The rash is slightly raised above the skin.
It showed up about 2 weeks ago and hasn't really changed or spread since then.
It itches mildly but it isn't stopping me from doing anything in my day.
I tried a new lotion about 3 weeks ago, right before the rash appeared.
I haven't switched any soaps or detergents, so I can't think of anything else that changed.
I'm a 28-year-old woman and I don't have any health conditions or take any medications.
